meta.title: About
meta.description: Brodsky Law PLLC is a New York law firm founded on the belief that quality divorce representation should be accessible and affordable. Learn about our firm and our managing attorney.

hero.title: Affordable divorce done right.
hero.paragraph1: With a focus on low-cost, client-friendly divorce services, Brodsky Law PLLC simplifies the divorce process and works to make the experience as smooth as possible for our clients.
hero.paragraph2: Managing attorney Jonah Brodsky is an experienced litigator who stays involved in your case from start to finish. We answer calls and emails quickly, and if you miss us, you can expect a prompt reply. Client service and responsiveness are top priorities.

mission.heading: We believe legal help should be accessible to everyone.
paragraphs: For too many New Yorkers, quality legal representation has been out of reach: not because the need wasn't there, but because traditional law firm billing models made it prohibitive. Brodsky Law was founded to change that dynamic.

We serve clients facing uncontested divorces who want a licensed attorney, not a document mill, at a price they can actually afford. And when cases become complicated, we have the litigation experience to see them through.
Every client receives transparency, responsiveness, and an attorney who is actually paying attention to their case.

bio.name: Jonah Brodsky
bio.imageAlt: Jonah Brodsky, Managing Attorney at Brodsky Law PLLC
paragraphs: Jonah Brodsky is the managing attorney of Brodsky Law PLLC and an experienced litigator licensed in New York, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania. He founded the firm to make quality legal representation, whether inside or outside the courthouse, more accessible to ordinary New Yorkers.
When you retain Brodsky Law, you are working with Jonah directly. He will personally see your case through from start to finish.

values.title: Affordability
values.body: Legal representation shouldn't be reserved for people with limitless budgets. We have structured our fees and processes so that most clients can access real attorney guidance at a price that makes sense.

values.title: Responsiveness
values.body: We return calls and emails quickly. Divorce is stressful enough without feeling like your attorney has gone silent. You will always know where your case stands.

values.title: Straightforwardness
values.body: We explain the law in plain language. We tell you what to expect, including when the answer might not be the one you were hoping for. No false promises, no unnecessary complexity.

values.title: Preparation
values.body: Even in simple uncontested matters, we prepare as if something could go sideways. That posture protects you and, in contested cases, puts you in the strongest possible negotiating position.

paymentStrip.heading: Payment plans that work for you.
paymentStrip.body: Get your case started with as little as $400 down. If you earn less than your spouse, New York law may require them to cover your legal fees; ask us how.

ctaBanner.heading: Meet Jonah. Get your case moving.
ctaBanner.subtext: Reach out for a free, no-obligation case estimate. We'll outline your options, timeline, and costs, usually the same day.
